# ZodiacMatch — Chinese Zodiac Compatibility
> https://zodiacmatch.xyz

ZodiacMatch is a free online tool that calculates Chinese zodiac compatibility between any two animal signs. Get instant scores for all 12 animals, 66 pairings, and five-element dynamics. No sign-up required.

## Core pages

- [Home page](https://zodiacmatch.xyz): interactive compatibility tool + all 12 animal profiles + pairing scores + FAQ
- [Blog](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog): in-depth guides to Chinese zodiac compatibility

## Blog

- [Chinese Zodiac Compatibility: The Complete Guide to Love Match](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/chinese-zodiac-compatibility-complete-guide): pillar guide covering how compatibility works, all 12 animals, best and worst matches, five elements, and FAQ
- [Rat and Dragon Compatibility](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/rat-and-dragon-compatibility): why Rat+Dragon is the most powerful zodiac pairing, in love and business
- [Tiger and Horse Compatibility](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/tiger-and-horse-compatibility): the passionate, freedom-loving Tiger and Horse match
- [The 5 Most Compatible Chinese Zodiac Signs Ranked](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/most-compatible-chinese-zodiac-signs): top 5 love matches with scores and detailed analysis
- [Chinese Zodiac Elements Compatibility](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/chinese-zodiac-elements-compatibility): how Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water affect your love match
- [Dragon and Monkey Compatibility](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/dragon-and-monkey-compatibility): the Three Harmony match between witty Monkey and charismatic Dragon

## Data

The tool covers all 12 Chinese zodiac animals (Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, Pig) with a full 12×12 compatibility matrix (144 pairings). Each pairing scores across three dimensions: natural affinity, element dynamics, and deep insight. The five-element cycle (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water) modulates every pairing based on birth-year element.
